Confidential Term Sheet (UAE law) — Proposed acquisition of 51% of Oasis Data Grid PJSC by Sand Dune Holdings Ltd (DIFC) — subject to SCA, ADGM FSRA, and DFSA oversight.
Parties and contacts: Buyer — Sand Dune Holdings Ltd (DIFC Licence No. CL-3001234), Seller — Al Rimal Ventures LLC (Dubai Trade Licence 987654321000), Target — Oasis Data Grid PJSC; contact: ir@oasisdatagrid.ae.
Purchase price and consideration: AED 412,500,000 in cash; escrow at Desert Bank PJSC, IBAN AE66 0000 1234 5678 9012 345 (corporate), completion by 30-Nov-2026, ADX listing intent in 2027.
Conditions precedent: regulatory clearances (SCA merger control, ADGM FSRA change-in-control), PDPL-compliant employee notifications, and confirm no material adverse change; for avoidance of doubt, a material adverse change shall not be deemed to have occurred due to public-source market movements or sector news.
Information sharing: Access to VDR limited to named users; PDPL safeguarded; Emirates ID fields redacted except last 3 digits; example mask: E I D : 784 - 1 9 8 6 - 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 - 8.
Key person access for diligence: Mr. Kareem Al Sahri (Chief Strategy Officer, Oasis Data Grid PJSC, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi), DOB 14-08-1986, work email k.sahri@oasisdatagrid.ae, session ref VDR-ADGM/8f92a_ks, device “FalconBook-AB12” (Windows 11) with IMEI 35-209900-112233-7, internal ac count ODG-CSO-001, location tag “Gate 2 Lobby”.
Identification for on-site meetings: Emirates ID shown in-person only (masked: 784-1986-******7-8); no copies retained; Mr. Kareem’s access badge No. ODG-AUH-0934 and visitor log 2026-05-11/12:40 noted for security; acquiring entity TRN 1029384756 and DIFC Licence CL-3001234 to be cited at reception.
Separated technical strings not tied to a person: device id aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff, test account GL-4421-ADGM, IP 10.14.22.8, browser ua “mozilla/5.0 (linux; android 14)”; these generic items do not identify an individual on their own.
Employment and continuity: Retain senior leadership for 18 months; optional disclosure of family-origin data for onboarding under PDPL consent forms; relocation allowance available for Abu Dhabi and Ras Al Khaimah offices.
Generic HR demographics (illustrative only): age band 30–35, south asian origin, dubai location, android devices; not attributable to any single data subject and not used for individual decisions.
Financing sources: mix of equity from Miraj Pearl Fund L.P. (ADGM Exempt Fund) and bank debt from Desert Bank PJSC; no forward-looking statements beyond those published on the target’s public website.
Market conduct: parties acknowledge UAE Market Abuse Regime (SCA, DFSA/FSRA); this term sheet does not contain issuer MNPI for DFM or ADX securities and is for discussion purposes; insiders list to be maintained in the VDR.
Communications and access: data room link https://vdr.sandune.ae/deal/ODG51?sid=YWRnbTpjYXNlJmFjY291bnQ9T0RHLUNTTy0wMDE and helpdesk ts@oasisdatagrid.ae; hotline +971-5X-XXX-XXXX; meeting notes saved under “/teams/deal-falcon/ts/2026_06”.
